  "complexity_notes": "This is a comprehensive technical architecture document (markdown), not a source code file, though it embeds several code snippets. Additional embedded code includes TypeScript type definitions for operation payloads, JSON schemas for JWT claims and structured logs, JSONC WebSocket message protocols, PromQL monitoring queries, a k6 load-test config, and bash disaster-recovery commands.
